commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6b5b3d3d754f8249938f735aa94ecf886c4f3f17)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a structured `core/doctor/gateway-services/extra` health finding and dry-run service cleanup effects while moving Doctor lint to contribution-ordered core checks plus extension checks.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +567, Docs +2. Total +571 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR emits a warning for every extra gateway service and wires that check into the contribution-ordered lint path. No live CLI proof was provided for the new behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to resolve the default-lint compatibility policy and require contributor real behavior proof before this PR is merge-ready.

target.title: Doctor: expose extra gateway service findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes extra gateway-like services as structured doctor health findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects only for legacy gateway service cleanup.
- Keeps the existing doctor:gateway-services legacy run path as the only real mutating cleanup path for normal doctor / doctor --fix.
- Keeps gateway platform notes in the existing gateway-services core-check group, so both gateway health IDs stay ordered under the same doctor contribution.
- Uses lazy imports from the core check so importing doctor-core-checks remains side-effect-safe in lightweight environments.

This is intentionally the small extra-service slice from the older gateway-services doctor PR. It does not migrate gateway service config repair, token drift repair, entrypoint rewrite, live-service safety, CLI --deep lint plumbing, or plugin-sensitive doctor rules.

## Stack

Stacked on #86627. The only new gateway-services commit in this PR is 5cb287ca81; the gateway-services delta is 5 files.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-gateway-services.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot --pool=forks --testTimeout=30000 --hookTimeout=30000` (2 files, 69 tests)
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
